eventWorkspace.name: Event Workspace
eventWorkspace.description: Embed the event workspace: visitors get the kassa with helper login, signed-in team members get the full workspace

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event to embed. Visitors log in as a helper first; team members see the full workspace.

height.label: Height
height.description: Height of the visitor kassa (the team-member workspace sizes itself). Compact/Tall sit inside the page flow. Fill screen makes the POS take the full viewport — pair it with the Full width size for a dedicated POS page.

liveDashboard.name: Live Dashboard
liveDashboard.description: Watch one event's live orders and sales online, read from the cloud mirror — with a 'last synced' indicator that goes stale when the till is offline. For signed-in team members.

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event's live data this dashboard shows.

title.label: Title
title.description: Optional heading above the dashboard (defaults to the event name).

ui.teamOnly: Sign in as a team member to view the live dashboard.

salesChart.name: Sales Chart
salesChart.description: Embed a sales analytics chart for one event or the whole team

eventScope.label: Event scope
eventScope.description: Limit to one event, or show all events for the team

title.label: Title
title.description: Optional heading above the chart (overrides the default)

salesProductMatrix.name: Sales Table (product × day)
salesProductMatrix.description: Pivot table of products by day with a Units/Revenue toggle

eventScope.label: Event scope
eventScope.description: Limit to one event, or show all events for the team

measure.label: Default measure
measure.description: Which measure the table shows first (viewers can toggle)

kitchenDisplay.name: Kitchen Display
kitchenDisplay.description: A drop-on-a-page kitchen screen (e.g. an iPad): shows the orders routed to a display station and lets staff bump them done.

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event's orders this screen shows.

locations.label: Locations
locations.description: Which locations this screen shows (e.g. Kitchen, Bar). Leave empty to show every location.
locations.needsEvent: Pick an event above first — then choose its locations.

ui.title: Kitchen Display
ui.allCaughtUp: All caught up — no open orders.

salesOrders.name: Orders
salesOrders.description: Shows one event's orders list on its own page. Visible to signed-in team members only.

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event's orders appear here.

ui.teamOnly: Sign in as a team member to view the orders.

salesClients.name: Clients
salesClients.description: Shows one event's open client tabs on its own page, with the per-client settle / print-receipt action. For signed-in team members and recurring-client events only.

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event's open client tabs appear here.

ui.teamOnly: Sign in as a team member to view the clients.
ui.notRecurring: This event doesn't use recurring clients, so there are no open tabs.

printBridge.name: Print Bridge
printBridge.description: A screen that prints pending tickets through the device OS / AirPrint dialog — for stations using the Browser / AirPrint driver.

eventSlug.label: Event
eventSlug.description: Pick which event tickets this bridge prints.

ui.title: Print Bridge
ui.hint: Keep this screen open near the printer. Tap Print to send a ticket to the print dialog.
ui.allPrinted: All caught up — nothing to print.

pos.name: Kassa
pos.description: Point of sale for the event

clients.name: Clients
clients.description: Open client tabs for the event

sync.staleDetail: last synced {ago} — the till may be offline
sync.waitingDetail: waiting for the first sync from the till

block.editToPickChart: Edit this block to pick a sales chart.
block.chartRendersOnPage: Chart renders on the published page
block.noHelperPinTitle: No helper PIN set for this event
block.noHelperPinDescription: On a scoped page this block is unlocked with the event’s helper PIN — without one, volunteers cannot log in. Set the PIN in the event’s settings.

cart.title: Cart
cart.selectClient: Please select a client to proceed
cart.locationRemarkPlaceholder: Add a remark for this location…

orders.title: Orders
orders.submittedSuccessfully: The order has been submitted successfully.
orders.printError: Could not trigger print for this order
orders.clientHelp: Select an existing client or create a new one
orders.clientRequiredDescription: This event requires a client. Please select or create one.

events.title: Events
events.description: Manage your events, products, and orders

form.remarkPromptHelp: Shown to the cashier when adding this product
form.locationRequired: Select the location this printer serves
form.title: Title
form.ipAddressHelp: LAN IP of the printer (RUT956 hands these out via DHCP). Port is always 9100.
form.printerTypeReceiptHelp: One combined customer receipt with the footer text
form.showPricesHelp: Prints the per-item prices and the total on tickets
form.printerActiveHelp: Turn off to temporarily take this printer out of use
form.activeHelp: Inactive products are hidden in the POS
form.driverHelp: How this station prints its tickets.
form.driverNetworkHelp: Thermal printer on the venue network (ESC/POS).
form.driverBrowserHelp: Print via the device print dialog from a print-bridge screen.

helperLogin.title: Helper Login
helperLogin.required: Helper login required to take orders.
helperLogin.staffLogin: Team member? Log in as admin
helperLogin.failed: Login failed. Please check your PIN.
helperLogin.checkUrl: Please check the URL and try again.
helperLogin.pleaseLogin: Please login to access the order interface

receipt.customize: Customize the text that appears on printed receipts.
receipt.specialInstructionsHelp: Header above remarks on kitchen tickets (e.g. the per-location remark from the register)
receipt.footerTextHelp: Printed at the bottom of customer receipts
receipt.settingsSavedDesc: Receipt text settings have been updated.

print.title: Print
print.name: Name
print.previewDescription: This shows how receipts will look when printed. The actual content will include real order data.
print.testQueuedDesc: A test print job has been sent to the printer.

workspace.requiresClientDesc: Pick the order's client from the saved client list — without this, the register asks for a free-text name (a client is always required)
workspace.duplicateEventDesc: Creates a copy of this event with its categories, locations, products and printers

clientsPanel.title: Client tabs
clientsPanel.empty: No active clients with orders yet

helpers.title: Active Helpers
helpers.description: Helpers currently logged in across all events for this team.

offline.title: Offline
offline.message: You are currently offline. Some features may be limited.
offline.banner: You are offline. Orders cannot be submitted.

printQueue.title: Print jobs
printQueue.noTicketForPrinter: No ticket — no items in this order go to this printer's location. Is a printer/location set on the products?
printQueue.resendNone: No failed print jobs to resend

errors.notResponding: Printer not responding — paper out, cover open, or offline?
errors.notEscpos: Unexpected response — not an ESC/POS printer?
errors.stoppedMidTicket: Printer stopped responding while printing (paper ran out mid-ticket?)
errors.parseFailed: Spooler could not read the print job
